name: raycast-pi
title: Pi
description: Raycast companion for the Pi coding agent: quick ask, session search, project launch, and terminal handoff.
author: qazi0

commands.name: ask-pi
commands.title: Ask Pi
commands.subtitle: Show Result
commands.description: Ask Pi from Raycast root and show the streamed answer

arguments.name: question
arguments.placeholder: What do you want to ask Pi?

commands.name: ask-pi-copy
commands.title: Ask Pi (Copy Answer)
commands.subtitle: No View
commands.description: Ask Pi and copy the answer without opening a view

arguments.name: question
arguments.placeholder: What do you want to ask Pi?

commands.name: projects
commands.title: Launch Project
commands.description: Open Pi in a project discovered from session history

commands.name: sessions
commands.title: Browse Sessions
commands.description: Find, preview, resume, and fork Pi sessions

commands.name: transform-selection
commands.title: Transform Selection
commands.description: Use Pi to explain, refactor, test, or improve selected text

commands.name: git-actions
commands.title: Git Actions
commands.description: Launch Git-aware Pi workflows in a visible terminal

commands.name: resources
commands.title: Browse Pi Resources
commands.description: Browse Pi prompt templates and skills

preferences.name: piBinaryPath
preferences.title: Pi Binary Path
preferences.description: Path to the pi executable. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH and common install locations.

preferences.name: agentDir
preferences.title: Pi Agent Directory
preferences.description: Directory containing Pi sessions, prompts, and skills. Defaults to ~/.pi/agent.

preferences.name: defaultProject
preferences.title: Default Project
preferences.description: Default working directory for Ask Pi and terminal handoffs.

preferences.name: defaultModel
preferences.title: Default Model
preferences.description: Optional Pi model pattern, for example openai/gpt-4o or anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.

preferences.name: thinkingLevel
preferences.title: Thinking Level
preferences.description: Optional thinking level passed to Pi.

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal Application
preferences.description: Terminal used for visible Pi handoff.

scripts.prepublishOnly: echo 'Use npm run publish for Raycast Store publishing.' && exit 1
